title: RawDocument
description: The original unmodified document fetched from the source, together with acquisition metadata.

document_id.description: Unique identifier for this raw document instance.

source_id.description: Identifies the source contract that produced this document.

fetch_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the document was fetched.

raw_content.description: The unaltered body of the fetched document (JSON, HTML, plain text, etc.).

content_type.description: MIME type or format hint for the raw content (e.g. 'application/json', 'text/html').

content_hash.description: Cryptographic hash (e.g. SHA-256) of the raw content for integrity checks.

fetch_metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs capturing fetch context (e.g. HTTP status, latency).

size_bytes.description: Size of the raw content in bytes.
